Package org.eventb.internal.core.refinement

Class RefineMachine

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.refinement.AbstractRefine
org.eventb.internal.core.refinement.RefineMachine
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRefinementParticipant
public class RefineMachine extends AbstractRefine
Refinement participant for refining a machine.

  • Constructor Details

    • RefineMachine

      public RefineMachine()

  • Method Details

    • process

      public void process(IInternalElement refinedRoot, IInternalElement sourceRoot, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IRefinementParticipant
      Modifies the given target root in order to make it (partially or entirely) a refinement of the given source root. The source root is not modified by this operation.
      Parameters:
      refinedRoot - the target root
      sourceRoot - the source of the refinement
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if a database operation fails, or is the refinement participant is invalid

    • createRefinesMachineClause
